description: hex hey <text> command. Two-tier classifier: keyword match first (80% of intents), LLM fallback via local qwen3:4b. Pairs with brain daemon for async execution.
feature: Hey Hex — Natural Language Task Enqueue

phases.description: New hey.rs command with 20-30 keyword patterns. Matches common intents (calibrate, rebuild, reconcile, cleanup, validate, etc).
phases.name: hex hey command + keyword classifier

tasks.description: New hex-cli/src/commands/hey.rs. Accepts free-form text as Vec<String> args. classify_intent(text) function matches keywords and returns TaskIntent enum (HexCommand, Shell, Workplan, Unknown). Wire hex hey <text...> and hex hey --queue <text...> in main.rs. Default: execute sync. With --queue: enqueue via enqueue_brain_task. Covers: calibrate inference, rebuild, reconcile workplans, cleanup worktrees, what's broken (validate), restart nexus, run <workplan>, bench <model>.
tasks.name: Create hex hey command with keyword intent classifier

phases.description: Destructive operations (worktree cleanup, delete, remove, rm) prompt y/N before executing.
phases.name: Confirmation prompts for destructive ops

tasks.description: In hey.rs: classify_intent returns a DESTRUCTIVE flag for dangerous operations. Before exec, prompt 'This will [description]. Proceed? [y/N]'. --yes flag bypasses. Destructive keywords: delete, remove, clean, rm, cleanup, force.
tasks.name: Add confirmation prompt for destructive intents

phases.description: When keyword match returns Unknown, call local inference (qwen3:4b on bazzite) to classify. Show classification, ask confirmation before execution.
phases.name: LLM fallback via local qwen3:4b

tasks.description: When classify_intent returns Unknown: POST to /api/inference/complete with model=qwen3:4b and a prompt asking to classify the intent into {kind, payload} JSON. Parse response. If kind is valid (hex-command/workplan/shell), show user the classified task and ask 'Execute? [y/N]' unless --yes. If still unknown, suggest manual invocation.
tasks.name: LLM-powered intent classification fallback
